sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-04-13 06:27
- Distance: 5.8 km
- Moving time: 34:50
- Elapsed time: 35:10
- Elevation gain: 118.6 m
- Average heart rate: 172.8 bpm
- Max heart rate: 187 bpm
- Average watts: 198.2 W
- Average speed: 9.9 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `176.7 bpm`, ranging from `164.5` to `185.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `171.0 bpm` and second-half average HR was `182.4 bpm` (+11.4 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `159.3 spm`, with a working range of `137.0` to `165.2 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `159.2 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `158.9 spm` (-0.3 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:03 /km` across `5.756 km` in `34:50` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:01 /km` and second-half pace was `6:05 /km` (+4 s/km), so pace stayed broadly even.

- Strava summary HR came in at `172.8 bpm` average and `187 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `166.4 bpm` in the first half and `178.8 bpm` in the second (+12.4 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `34:50` out of `35:10` elapsed (99.1%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `7` stop segments and `1.1%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `122.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `41.0 m` and `86.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `59.0 m` in the first half and `63.0 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
